title: For Consumers | FDA
text:
and Keep a Medication List for Your Health 
Many people of all ages take medications. Keeping track of when, how and why you use medications is important for your health and safety.
Pulse Oximeter Basics 
A pulse oximeter, or pulse ox, is a device that estimates the amount of oxygen in the blood. Here’s what to know before using one.
